response.justification: Bogdan brings valuable geospatial domain expertise and staff-level systems engineering credentials, including prior C++ work and distributed-systems knowledge. However, the last 2-3 years of TypeScript/web focus (Stripe, Shopify) create a misalignment with the role's immediate C++ systems requirements. His proven ability to expand expertise across diverse tech stacks partially mitigates this concern, making him worth interviewing to assess ramp-up feasibility.
strengths: Geospatial and navigation systems domain expertise from GIS app and routing platform development
Distributed systems background from Dunnhumby microservices infrastructure handling millions of requests/second
Staff-level seniority at top companies with demonstrated ability to learn across diverse technology stacks
concerns: Recent focus on TypeScript/web development (2+ years at Shopify, Stripe) diverges from C++ systems work
Geospatial/routing expertise is 5+ years old; unclear if pipeline architecture knowledge aligns with current production systems
No Rust experience and no recent C++ work despite C++ background at National Instruments

key_factors.factor: Tech stack gap from C++ systems work
Staff-level engineering background and learning agility
